tweets.full_text:
🚨 The authors found that, by mid-2025, 35% of newly published websites were AI-generated or AI-assisted (up from zero before ChatGPT’s launch).

Interesting paper on the impact of AI-generated text on the internet, relying on data from the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine.

Congratulations to the paper authors Jonáš Doležal, @ibnesayeed, @MarkGraham, and @matybohacek.

Most people don't think about it, but soon, the vast majority of the internet will be AI-generated or AI-assisted (and it will be used to train LLMs that will output more AI text).

We still don't know the individual and collective practical implications of this. 

👉 Download the full paper below.

tweets.full_text:
How are large language models impacting the submission and review process at high-impact journals? Severely.

Since the release of ChatGPT in 2022, AI-generated and AI-assisted papers, identified by Pangram, drove a 42% increase in submission volume at Organization Science (figure below). While the journal rejected the majority of these submissions, there is a human cost to reviewing papers, which volunteer reviewers are shouldering. AI-generated content is also showing up in reviews, which similarly suffer in quality because of it -- editors at Organization Science found that AI-generated reviews are lower quality, less specific, and less topically diverse than human-written ones.

The problem is not isolated. Earlier this year, ICML desk-rejected 497 papers from authors who submitted AI-generated reviews, after those authors opted into a policy that disallowed the use of AI. Grant funders also saw a surge in applications: the Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions, a set of major research fellowships for the EU, received 142% more proposals in 2025 compared to 2022.

Many scientific and academic systems implicitly rely on friction as a barrier to entry. LLMs have removed that friction, allowing for a deluge of AI slop that is straining the capacity of these institutions.

tweets.full_text:
So you know the company that makes Claude, the AI you’ve probably used? 

They just built something so dangerous they refuse to release it to the public.

It is called Claude Mythos, and here is the insane part: 

Anthropic did not train it to be a hacking tool, the capabilities just appeared on their own as a byproduct of making it smarter.

They looked at what it could do and said we cannot let anyone have this.

What can it do? 

It found thousands of previously unknown security vulnerabilities in every major operating system and every major web browser.

Including a 27-year-old bug in OpenBSD, one of the most secure operating systems ever built, that the entire global security community missed for nearly three decades.

An Anthropic engineer with zero security training asked it to find a remote code execution vulnerability before going to bed, woke up the next morning and had a complete working exploit waiting.

Over 99% of the vulnerabilities it found were still unpatched at the time of the breach.

So instead of releasing it, Anthropic gave access to 40 companies including Apple, Google, Microsoft, and JPMorgan under Project Glasswing, backed by $100 million in usage credits.

The idea being: let defenders use it before attackers get something similar.

Then unauthorized users got in anyway, on the exact same day it was announced, exploiting a contractor's credentials and making educated guesses about the model's location.

The U.S. Treasury Secretary called an emergency meeting with Goldman Sachs, Citi, and other big banks specifically because of Mythos.

Mozilla used it to find and patch 271 Firefox vulnerabilities in weeks.

The UK's AI Security Institute confirmed it is the first AI model to complete a simulated full network takeover.

And OpenAI announced a similar model just one week later.

We are in a completely different era with this stuff and most people have no idea.

Source: Anthropic, TechCrunch, Bloomberg

tweets.full_text:
The launch of $CERB marks the introduction of a system designed to actively protect user wallets, not just a token entering the market.

Instead of launching first and building utility later, $CERB is tied to an existing framework where AI agents monitor, analyze and respond to wallet activity in real time across multiple chains.

Launching through Raydium LaunchLab places @CerbAgent at a point where wallet exploits are still a major challenge, and most users are left to manage security on their own.

What makes this different is the shift in how protection works.

Rather than relying on users to detect problems after they happen, $CERB’s AI agents review transactions before approval, identify potential risks, and respond immediately if something looks suspicious.

This changes security from a manual process into a continuous one.

With $CERB, protection is not something users have to remember... it runs in the background at all times.

tweets.full_text:
KITE DEPLOYS L1 MAINNET ON AVALANCHE

Kite officially activates its mainnet as a sovereign Avalanche (@Avax) L1 designed to provide cryptographic identity and execution for autonomous AI agents. 

The launch follows a massive testnet phase that processed 1.9 billion interactions from over 20 million users with sub-second finality. 

Backed by $33M from PayPal Ventures and General Catalyst, the network utilizes "Kite Passport" to enable agents to execute stablecoin-based settlements for API calls and data access without human intervention.

Strategic pilots are currently underway with PayPal and Shopify to bridge agentic workflows with global retail and payment infrastructure.

【 GitHub Copilot は 6 月 1 日から従量課金制に】

GitHub Copilot のすべてのプランは従量課金制となります。
プラン料金は変わらず AI クレジット制となり、5 月上旬には予想されるコストを事前に確認いただけるよう「プレビュー請求書機能」をリリース予定です。

tweets.full_text:
来るよ、大急騰！！
フィジカルAI第2波が日本株を完全飲み込み始めた。

テスラOptimus、量産本格化を公式発表！
日本政府、ロボAI基金1兆円をぶち込み。
実世界ロボAI需要、再爆発どころか大噴火。
日本企業に世界No.1の注文が殺到中 – 今すぐ買え。

注目銘柄／最強日本株8選

第1位：THK（6481）
ロボ用リニアガイド世界No.1。人型関節部品、需要急騰。

第2位：シンフォニアテクノロジー（6276）
ロボハンド・自動化装置トップ。特需、直撃どころか直撃すぎる。

第3位：ヤマハ発動機（7272）
産業ロボ・人型開発をさらに加速。量産化のリーダー。

第4位：村田製作所（6981）
AIセンサー・電子部品最強。ロボへの実装力は圧倒的。

第5位：デンソー（6902）
協働ロボ技術は世界級。自動車×AIの融合ここに極まれり。

第6位：日本電産（6593）
精密モーター世界シェアNo.1。ロボ駆動系の心臓部。

第7位：住友重機械工業（6302）
産業ロボット・減速機で有力。フィジカルAIの基盤を握る。

第8位：TDK（6762）
センサー＆バッテリーでロボAI最強。これも買わない手はない。

静かに動く者だけが勝つ。
来年の今頃、お前は年金なんてクソくらえと思う。
今、行動した奴だけが次の大波を掴み取る。

よく聞かれる「なぜ有料にしないの？」
答えは簡単。株の発信は趣味。金に困ってないから、全て無料で叩き出す。

（投資は自己責任で。最後は自分の頭で決めろ。）

user.name: 株式投資太郎

最新の日本株情報を共有していきまっせ～25年間で資金は50万円から30億円に増加。経験と実証分析を組み合わせ、価値と成長を兼ね備えた企業を発掘するのが得意です。実用性と先見性のある情報を発信します。

quoted_status.full_text:
『まーしー式AIスライドSKILL』リリースしました！

今まで長時間掛けてスライドを作成していたストレスが一気に無くなります。

・自分で制作してた人はは作業時間が10枚10分で作成可能
・外注費を掛けてた人のコストカット
・AIっぽいスライド感も無いスライドを作れる

全てのスライド作成のストレスを全部無くすことができるAIスライド作成です

そして今回特典では

✅アフィリエイト報酬（紹介料）50%
✅まーしー式AIスライド50テンプレート
✅LINEコミュニティのご招待
✅1ヶ月質問し放題
✅Claude Codeを触れない人のためのClaude Code初心者向け講座
✅「まーしー式AIスライド」の作成を一緒に行う実践会のご招待

購入者が「買ったけどできなかった…」を無くすために【特典】もお付けしました！

全ての事業者がスライド作成に使っていた時間をゼロにして、空いた時間で家族や、お客様、友人と人との時間に使って頂けると嬉しいです。

下記のオープンチャットから案内を受け取ってください
